---
title: "4 · Assimilation"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** How observations update the state: precision-weighted spatial fusion of sensors, the
depth separation of dv/v into soil-moisture and water-table states, and the static / dynamic /
downscaling uncertainty budget with the variogram-driven confidence mask.
:::

*Content migrating from the assimilation machinery, "Uncertainty Quantification", and the
confidence-mask sections.*

## Precision-weighted point assimilation

## dv/v depth separation into hydrologic states

## The uncertainty budget (static / dynamic / downscaling)

## Confidence mask and honest masking
